project.name: ITSPRELUDE Performance System
project.description: AI-powered workforce performance & productivity management SaaS platform. Multi-tenant. Tracks employee performance, KPIs, accountability, productivity, and generates business intelligence.

frontend.charts: Recharts (lazy loaded via next/dynamic, ssr: false)
frontend.forms: React Hook Form + Zod (minimal re-renders, type-safe)
frontend.server_state: TanStack Query (React Query) — caching, optimistic updates
frontend.icons: Lucide React (tree-shaken, import only what you use)
frontend.fonts: Inter + JetBrains Mono + Manrope — self-hosted woff2, font-display: swap
frontend.auth: NextAuth.js (JWT with httpOnly refresh tokens, or Clerk)

tasks: Project init: create-next-app with TS + Tailwind + App Router, shadcn init
Configure tailwind.config.ts with custom colors, fonts, radii, shadows
Self-host fonts in public/fonts/
Create globals.css with design tokens as CSS custom properties
Setup lib/api-client.ts (fetch wrapper with auto-refresh on 401)
Setup lib/auth.ts (NextAuth config with credentials + Google OAuth)
Setup providers (ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, SessionProvider)
Create root layout.tsx with font loading (next/font)
Create middleware.ts (auth check + role-based route redirect)
Login page (email/password form with validation)
Register page (org creation wizard with steps)
Forgot password page
Dashboard layout (sidebar + top navbar + responsive drawer on mobile)
Sidebar component (collapsible, menu items filtered by role)
Theme toggle (dark/light, persisted to localStorage, respects prefers-color-scheme)
Error boundary at root + per route segment
Employee dashboard: DailyTargetsCard, SubmissionForm, PerformanceSummary, YourRank
Daily performance submission with dynamic KPI fields (determined by user's team/role)
Manager dashboard: TeamActivityOverview, PendingReviewsList, UnderperformersTable
Manager review flow: approve/reject/comment on submissions
Founder dashboard: KpiSummaryGrid (4 cards), ConversionFunnel, WeeklyTrends, LeaderboardPreview, AiInsightsPanel
KPI management: CRUD with dynamic KPI builder (name, metric_type, weightage, scoring_logic)
Target management: daily/weekly/monthly targets per user/team/department
Department management: CRUD
Team management: CRUD with member assignment
Leaderboard: daily/weekly/monthly tabs, filters by team, user rank card
Gamification: XP points on submission (+50), streaks tracking, achievement badges
Notification system: in-app dropdown + full page, email via SendGrid
WebSocket integration: live dashboard updates, real-time notifications
Reports: generate PDF/Excel/CSV, list with download, schedule auto-reports
User management: employees table (virtualized, sortable, filterable), bulk invite
AI Insights panel: trend analysis cards, burnout detection, revenue forecasting (mock LLM)
Activity monitoring: login history, submission consistency, attendance patterns
Settings page: org branding (logo, colors), profile settings, notification preferences
Subscription management (Stripe placeholder)
Testing: unit tests for components, integration tests for forms, e2e for critical flows
Build verification: npm run build passes, bundle size within budget, Lighthouse >= 90

auth: /(auth)/login/page.tsx — email + password form, role-based redirect on success
/(auth)/register/page.tsx — org signup: name, email, password, company name, team size
/(auth)/layout.tsx — centered card on dark gradient bg (surface-primary to surface-secondary)
employee: /(dashboard)/employee/page.tsx — daily targets, submission form, performance summary, your rank
manager: /(dashboard)/manager/page.tsx — team activity overview, pending reviews, underperformers, target progress
/(dashboard)/manager/team/[id]/page.tsx — team detail: member list with KPI progress
founder_admin: /(dashboard)/founder/page.tsx — KPI summary (4 cards), conversion funnel, weekly trends, AI insights, top 5 leaderboard
/(dashboard)/founder/employees/page.tsx — virtualized table, filters by dept/team/status, bulk invite
/(dashboard)/founder/kpis/page.tsx — dynamic KPI builder (name, type, weight, scoring logic)
/(dashboard)/founder/targets/page.tsx — bulk target editor (per period, per user/team)
/(dashboard)/founder/leaderboard/page.tsx — full leaderboard with tabs and filters
shared_layout: /(dashboard)/layout.tsx — sidebar + top navbar, auth check, Suspense boundaries
/layout.tsx — root: font loading, ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, SessionProvider

format.response: { success: boolean, data: T, message?: string, meta?: { page, limit, total, hasMore } }
format.error: { success: false, message: string, errorCode: string, details?: Record<string, string[]> }

users.GET /users/:id: profile with department, team, role, manager

performance.GET /performance-entries/summary: aggregated per user (current vs target, trend)

notifications.GET /notifications: paginated, newest first, unread count in header

kpi_card.props: title (string), icon (string), current (number), target (number), trend (up|down|flat), trendValue (string), unit (string?)

states.normal: Icon + label + '30 / 50' + progress bar (color by pct: >=80% green, 50-79% amber, <50% red) + trend indicator (green up / red down / gray flat)

kpi_card.behavior: Re-fetches every 60s via React Query refetchInterval. Progress bar: CSS transition width 500ms.

states.empty: No KPIs configured. Ask your manager.
states.form: Dynamic input fields based on user's team KPIs, validation (min 0, max 100000, required if active), notes textarea (max 500 chars), file upload (max 5MB)
states.success: Green toast 'Submitted! Streak: X days' + clear form
states.error: Red toast + inline field errors + auto-save draft to localStorage
states.offline: Yellow banner 'Saving draft...' + queue submission, retry on reconnect

submission_form.behavior: Auto-saves draft to localStorage every 30s. Optimistic update via React Query mutation.

data_table.props: columns (ColumnDef[]), data (Row[]), totalRows (number), pageSize (default 25), onSort, onFilter, onRowClick
data_table.performance: Server-side sorting and filtering. Debounced 300ms. No row animations. Fixed-width columns where possible.

states.empty: Start tracking to see your funnel

conversion_funnel.performance: Lazy loaded (next/dynamic). Only import Funnel + ResponsiveContainer from Recharts.

states.empty: AI analysis runs nightly. Check back tomorrow.
states.normal: Cards with natural language insight text

ai_insights_panel.performance: Lazy loaded. Data cached 1 hour. Plain text cards only — no markdown renderer.

state_management.forms: React Hook Form + Zod (minimal re-renders via register/watcher)
state_management.ui_state: Zustand for theme and sidebar (persisted to localStorage)
state_management.url_state: useSearchParams for filters and pagination (shareable URLs)
state_management.real_time: WebSocket via NestJS Gateway (subscribe to org:${orgId} and user:${userId} rooms)

performance_rules: All charts lazy loaded via next/dynamic with ssr: false
No Framer Motion or animation libraries — CSS transitions only (transform + opacity)
Fonts self-hosted with font-display: swap — zero CLS
Images use next/image with remotePatterns config
API calls through React Query with staleTime >= 30s for dashboard data
Optimistic updates on all form submissions
Suspense boundaries around every data-fetching component
Prefer Server Components — only add 'use client' when interactivity is needed
CSS containment (contain: content) on dashboard widgets
All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce (disable entirely)

every_component_must_have: normal state (real data, no mount animations)
accessibility: Focus-visible ring on all interactive elements
Color not used alone to convey info (add icons/badges)
All forms: label + error via aria-describedby
Modals: focus trap + escape to close + aria-modal
shadcn_imports_only: Button, Card, Input, Select, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Table, Tabs, Badge, Avatar, Skeleton, Toast, Tooltip
do_not_import: Carousel, Calendar, Form (use react-hook-form), Charts (use Recharts), Sonner

deployment.backend: AWS ECS Fargate (production) / Docker Compose (local dev)
deployment.ci_cd: GitHub Actions: lint -> typecheck -> test -> build -> deploy

build_verification: npm run build passes with zero errors
npm run lint passes (strict ESLint config)
Lighthouse score >= 90 for Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices
All pages render: loading -> empty -> error states tested
Auth flow: login -> redirect -> session persist -> logout tested

folder_structure.public/fonts: Inter, JetBrains Mono, Manrope woff2 files
